title: Semicolon and a tiny sentence
description: Right pinky — the semicolon. Make a sentence!
text: ; ; ; a sad lad; a fall; jak falls; dad asks;
tips: Semicolon (;) is your right pinky's home

character_tips.anna: First sentence ever! "A sad lad". You're writing 🌸
character_tips.maxim: Real sentence. The first of many.
character_tips.knopych: SENTENCE LEVEL UNLOCKED! 🎉 "a sad lad" — that's writing!
character_tips.klavochka: A whole sentence, my treasure! 💖 Look at you!
